decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: minimal — just name and title, lots of whitespace
hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
hero_background: large faded typography watermark in background
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
nav_style: hidden on scroll down, shows on scroll up
scroll_animation: playful — elements slide/bounce in from different directions
color_scheme: light mode with dark hero section
quirk: section titles are rotated vertically along the left edge
